location.name: Oakheart Village
location.description: A timber village built around a broad ancient oak.

nearby_entities.name: Mayor Elira
nearby_entities.description: Oakheart's practical mayor, tired but composed.

nearby_entities.name: Ranger Tomas
nearby_entities.description: A keen-eyed scout who trusts tracks more than gossip.

nearby_entities.name: Smith Brenna
nearby_entities.description: A blacksmith with soot on her sleeves and sharp opinions.

adjacent_places.description: A muddy trail cutting through pines toward the old watchtower.

recent_events.title: An uneasy morning
recent_events.description: Villagers whisper about trouble at the ruined watchtower.

recent_events.title: A new journey begins
recent_events.description: Wanderer arrives in Oakheart Village seeking purpose.

visible_facts.text: A goblin scout is occupying the ruined watchtower.

relevant_beliefs.belief_text: The tracks around the tower belong to goblins, not bandits.
Bandits have probably moved into the watchtower.
Something cursed sits under the tower stones.
